title: Alumni | The Webb Schools | Private Boarding & Day School in California
content:
View Upcoming Alumni Events
Stay In Touch
We love hearing from Webb Alumni!
Let us know what you've been up to! Whether it’s career news, alumni meetups, weddings, birth announcements, or other life updates, we love hearing, sharing, and celebrating news from our alumni!
Email us at
alumni@webb.org
to let us know what you have going on!
Amanda Sun
Webb Alumni Office
List of 1 items.
Transcript Requests
To request a copy of your transcript, please email Briar Rose Tirpak.
Click here to contact the Registrar
SAVE THE DATE!
Alumni Weekend 2026 is October 23-24!
We look forward to seeing you this fall for Alumni Weekend 2026! Classes ending in 1s and 6s, are you ready to celebrate your milestone reunions?
For more information, contact the alumni office at (909) 482-5230 or
alumni@webb.org
.
View photos from Alumni Weekend 2025
Webb Alumni pose inside the Vivian Webb Chapel during Alumni Weekend 2022.
Webbies in the greater Los Angeles area gather for the LA Holiday Party in 2023.
Alumni pose with current students while attending a Back in Class math session during Alumni Weekend.
The Class of 1993 raise their glasses to toast the Alumni Weekend celebrations in Price Dining Hall.
Alumni have the opportunity to impart wisdom, spread insight, and network with junior students during Junior Career Evening early in the spring semester.
Young alumni return to Webb every winter for cookies and cocoa in celebration of the holidays at the Young Alumni Holiday Party.

Update Your Contact Information
Do we have your current contact information? Update your contact information to stay informed of Webb alumni news and events. To update your contact information, contact the Alumni Office.

Alumni News Stories
Celebrating Webb Alumni Who Inspire and Lead
10/17/2025
Webbies continue to shape the world in extraordinary ways. Through the Alumni Awards program, the Alumni Council and Board of Trustees annually recognize alumni whose accomplishments and contributions exemplify one or more core principles of Webb’s mission:
Think boldly, mindfully, and creatively,
Act with honor and moral courage,
Lead with distinction,
Serve with a generous spirit.
Read More
Stephen Farley ’81 to Unveil Community Art Installation at New Pomona Light Rail Train Station
7/22/2025
Stephen Farley ’81 will debut his latest tilography installation,
The Power of Pomona is People
, on Saturday, July 26 at 9:30 a.m. at the new
Pomona North Metrolink/Metro Light Rail Station
, located less than 3 miles south of The Webb Schools on Garey Avenue.
Read More
Welcoming Coleen Martinez ’86 as Webb’s New Alumni Council President
7/7/2025
We’re excited to announce Coleen Martinez ’86 as the new Alumni Council President. She hopes to serve as a catalyst for communication and goodwill within the Webb community:
“Continuing to strengthen the bonds and friendships with so many wonderful people from diverse backgrounds and generations can be a fundamental networking opportunity for current students as well as the alumni at large. I learn from others every day (including my second graders), and I look forward to continuing to learn and flourish with all of you.”
Read More
2025 Commencement Speaker Announced
4/16/2025
The end of the school year is fast approaching and with that, excitement is in the air as The Webb Schools prepares to celebrate the graduating Class of 2025. We are thrilled to announce John Scalzi ’87 as this year’s commencement speaker.
Read More
A New Focus for Junior Career Evening
3/14/2025
Alumni and Friends Share Career Skills, Advice, and Stories with Students
Read More
Webb Trustee Dr. Sandra Lee ’88 premiering new show on Lifetime TV
3/7/2025
From Webb to worldwide fame! 🌎💙 Webb Trustee Dr. Sandra Lee ’88—better known as Dr. Pimple Popper—has built a dermatologic empire, amassing a hit reality show as well as a successful skincare line and major pharmaceutical endorsements. With patients traveling from around the world to see her, Sandra continues to transform lives through her expertise, one cyst removal at a time.
Read More
Dayun Suh ’24 publishes rare fossil research
2/18/2025
Dayun Suh ’24 recently published research on a rare fossil tuna from the Duho Formation (Miocene) of South Korea. Her team’s research suggests the fossil could be a previously undiscovered species. She began independent research into the fossil while studying at Webb, receiving research mentorship from Alf Museum curator Dr. Balisi.
Read More
Kyle Smith ’12 is NFL’s First Fashion Editor
2/14/2025
Did you catch the expert fashion commentary on the red carpet at Super Bowl LIX? That was Webb alum Kyle Smith ’12, the NFL’s recent hire!
Read More
Rajan Bhatt ’90 Named CEO of One of the Nation’s Largest Privately Held Orthopedic Groups
12/20/2024
Dr. Rajan Bhatt ’90 has been appointed Chief Executive Officer of OrthoArizona. With his credentials spanning both medicine and business leadership, this renowned physician-entrepreneur brings a unique perspective to leading this organization into its next phase of growth and operational advancement.
Read More
2024 Alumni Award Recipients Announced
10/9/2024
Think. Act. Lead. Serve. At The Webb Schools, our alumni are the living embodiment of our mission—thinking deeply, acting with purpose, leading with integrity, and serving selflessly.
Read More
